data.title: Leica Store Boston hosts event on women's rights, collaborations with Yellow Rose Project and Concept Aware. Jan. 17.
data.description: In Teaneck, New Jersey, on January 9, 2026, Leica is hosting an event called Keeping Women's Rights in the Picture: A Live Discussion in collaboration with Yellow Rose Project and Concept Aware Podcast. This community-centered event will be held at the Leica Store & Gallery Boston on Saturday, January 17. The event aims to promote discussion and awareness surrounding women's rights.

data.title: InfoFi is transitioning from paying for posts to valuing credibility, splitting into content arbitrage & signal infrastructure. Content value decreases due to spam. Platforms like Kaito AI and Galxe drive user rewards. Web3 category divides into two models: content arbitrage & signal infrastructure. Spam increases as participation grows. Full story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: InfoFi launched last year with the goal of assigning a monetary value to information, rewarding users for their commentary and social engagement. The platform gained popularity but is now facing challenges as spam increases and yields decrease. In 2026, InfoFi is divided into two sectors: content arbitrage, focusing on engagement and rewards, and signal infrastructure, emphasizing credibility over volume. The shift is reshaping the market and opportunities. The initial platforms rewarded users with tokens or points for their activity, leading to rapid growth but also a decline in value due to an excess of content. The current trend is splitting into two distinct categories, content arbitrage, and signal infrastructure, with different strategies and economic models. You can read the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: dxFeed excels in 2025 SIFMA/FIA Industry-Wide BC & DR Test, showing strong performance in global financial industry.
data.description: In New York on January 9, 2026, dxFeed, a prominent provider of market data solutions and index management services for the worldwide financial sector, announced the successful conclusion of the 2025 SIFMA/FIA Industry-Wide Business Continuity (BC) and Disaster Recovery (DR) Test. This accomplishment highlights dxFeed's continued reliability and expertise in the industry.

data.title: Vistra signs 20-year deal to supply Meta with 2,600 MW of zero-carbon power from nuclear plants, boosting stock.
data.description: Shares of Vistra Corp. (NYSE: VST) increased following the announcement of a 20-year power purchase agreement (PPAs) with Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ: META). The agreement entails the supply of more than 2,600 MW of zero-carbon power from three nuclear plants to support Meta's operations. Meta will acquire 2,176 MW of nuclear energy from Vistra's Perry and Davis-Besse plants in Ohio, in addition to 433 MW of capacity from uprates at Perry, Davis-Besse, and Beaver Valley in Pennsylvania. The deal represents over 15% of Meta's total energy needs. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.description: Last week, a report stated that the unemployment rate in the country reached 5.2%, with a total of 8.4 million people currently out of work. This marks a slight increase from the previous month. Additionally, it was noted that 2.3 million new jobs were created in various sectors, showing some signs of recovery in the labor market. The report also highlighted the challenges faced by the younger population, with an unemployment rate of 12.6% among those aged 18-24. Experts are closely monitoring these trends to assess the overall economic impact and guide future policy decisions.

data.title: Kara Hurst, Chief Sustainability Officer at Amazon, elected as Chair of Water.org Board of Directors.
data.description: In Kansas City, Missouri on January 9, 2026, Water.org revealed the appointment of Kara Hurst, the Chief Sustainability Officer at Amazon, as the new Chair of its Board of Directors. Hurst's election comes at a critical time as Water.org aims to expand its market-driven initiatives to assist additional families.

data.title: Donald Bowen, former Urban League president, backs Dream Exchange as an investor. Introduced Jan. 9, 2026.
data.description: A prominent figure in the Urban League and Urban Empowerment Fund, Donald Bowen, announced his support for Dream Exchange on January 9, 2026. Bowen, a former Senior Vice President and Chief Program Officer of the National Urban League, has joined as an investor in the platform. This endorsement further strengthens Dream Exchange's position in the financial market, with Bowen's backing adding to the credibility and potential growth of the initiative.

data.title: Cool Company Ltd. merges with EPS Ventures Ltd. subsidiary; fully completed with approval from Bermuda Registrar of Companies.
data.description: In London, Cool Company Ltd. (CoolCo) announced on January 6, 2026, that the merger with an EPS Ventures Ltd. subsidiary has met all requirements for completion. The stock exchange announcement revealed that the merger, carried out via a cash merger, has been successfully registered in the Bermuda Registrar of Companies. CoolCo trades on NYSE under CLCO and CLCO.OL.

data.title: Eastern Union closed loans with 150 lenders in 2025, 1/3 from new lenders, a major feat for the real estate brokerage.
data.description: In 2025, Eastern Union, a major commercial real estate brokerage in the US, successfully secured and closed loans with a total of 150 lenders, marking a significant achievement for the company. This accounts for approximately one-third of all commercial mortgages arranged throughout the year. By actively cultivating new partnerships and expanding their network, Eastern Union continues to establish itself as a key player in the industry.

data.title: Riley Permian (REPX) declares $0.40 quarterly dividend for common stock. Board of Directors approved.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, in Oklahoma City, Riley Exploration Permian, Inc. (NYSE American: REPX) disclosed that their Board of Directors sanctioned a cash dividend of $0.40 per share on the Company's common stock.

data.title: Burton debuts 'From Burton to the World' collection in Aspen & Laax with limited edition items showcasing Jake Burton quotes.
data.description: Burlington, Vermont - On January 9, 2026, Burton revealed the 'From Burton to the World' limited edition collection. This drop includes snowboards, apparel, and accessories emblazoned with iconic quotes from Jake Burton. The collection is a celebration of Burton's legacy and influence and is available for a limited time only.
